MINISTRY OF LABOUR AND EMPLOYMENT NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 31st December, 2014 S.O. 3326(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (2) of section 1 of the Labour Laws (Exemption from Furnishing Returns and Miantaining Registers by certain Establishments) Amendment Act, 2014 (30 of 2014), the Central Government hereby appoints the 1st day of January, 2015 as the date on whcih the said Act shal come into force. [Z- 20025/1/2012-Coord (Vol. III)] DHEERAJ KUMAR, Jt. Secy. -- 1 of 1 --
